verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: The moderator correctly identified a consensus among the active agents (Landscape and Botanics both listed Spain as a top candidate). No debate was necessary as there was no disagreement to resolve.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the lack of hard constraints and the ambiguity of the soft evidence. The final reasoning was sound given the inputs, though the prediction (Spain) was incorrect due to the inherent ambiguity of the visual features.
